'''Quedlifu''' was a [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who served circa [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. Quedlifu chaired the [[Economics Committee]].<ref name="SOTP" />

{{Char-stub}}
